results.question: 求极限：lim_{x→0} (sin x - x)/x^3。
results.intern_reasoning: 首先，使用泰勒展开法，将sinx展开为x - x³/6 + x⁵/120 - …，代入分子得sinx - x = -x³/6 + x⁵/120 - …，除以x³后为-1/6 + x²/120 - …，当x→0时，高阶项趋近于0，故极限为-1/6。其次，使用洛必达法则：原式为0/0型，第一次求导得(cosx - 1)/(3x²)，仍为0/0型；第二次求导得(-sinx)/(6x)，此时极限为-1/6。两种方法结果一致，验证了答案的正确性。

代入分子得sinx - x = -x³/6 + x⁵/120 - …

应用洛必达法则第一次：分子导数cosx -1，分母导数3x²
再次应用洛必达法则：分子导数-sinx，分母导数6x
极限变为(-sinx)/(6x)→-1/6

import Mathlib
open Real

-- 定义 u_n = arctan(n + k) - arctan(n)，其中 k > 0 为常数
def u (k : ℝ) (n : ℕ) : ℝ := Real.arctan ((n : ℝ) + k) - Real.arctan (n : ℝ)

-- 定理：级数 ∑_{n=1}^∞ (-1)^n u_n 绝对收敛
theorem series_absolutely_convergent (k : ℝ) (hk : k > 0) : Summable (λ (n : ℕ) => ((-1 : ℝ) ^ n) * u k n) := by
  -- 首先证明 ∑ |(-1)^n u_n| = ∑ u_n 收敛
  have hpos : ∀ n : ℕ, u k n ≥ 0 := by
    intro n
    have h : (n : ℝ) + k > (n : ℝ) := by linarith
    have h_arctan : Real.arctan ((n : ℝ) + k) > Real.arctan (n : ℝ) := Real.strictMonoOn_arctan (by positivity) (by positivity) h
    linarith
  
  -- 使用比较判别法：u_n ≤ k / (1 + n^2)
  have h_bound : ∀ n : ℕ, u k n ≤ k / ((1 : ℝ) + (n : ℝ)^2) := by
    intro n
    -- 利用中值定理：存在 c ∈ (n, n+k) 使得 u_n = k / (1 + c^2)
    -- 由于 c > n，所以 1/(1+c^2) < 1/(1+n^2)
    have h_deriv : ∀ x : ℝ, deriv Real.arctan x = 1 / (1 + x^2) := by
      intro x
      have h_deriv_arctan : deriv Real.arctan x = 1 / (1 + x ^ 2) := by
        rw [deriv_arctan]
      exact h_deriv_arctan
    -- 应用均值定理
    have h_mvt : ∃ (c : ℝ), c ∈ Set.Ioo ((n : ℝ)) ((n : ℝ) + k) ∧ Real.arctan ((n : ℝ) + k) - Real.arctan (n : ℝ) = (1 / (1 + c^2)) * k := by
      apply exists_deriv_eq_slope (Real.arctan) (n : ℝ) ((n : ℝ) + k)
      · exact differentiableAt_arctan (by positivity)
      · exact differentiableAt_arctan (by positivity)
    rcases h_mvt with ⟨c, hc, h_eq⟩
    have hc_pos : c > (n : ℝ) := hc.1
    have hc_lt : c < (n : ℝ) + k := hc.2
    have h_ineq : 1 / (1 + c^2) ≤ 1 / (1 + (n : ℝ)^2) := by
      refine one_div_le_one_div (by positivity) (by positivity) ?_
      nlinarith
    calc
      u k n = Real.arctan ((n : ℝ) + k) - Real.arctan (n : ℝ) := rfl
      _ = (1 / (1 + c^2)) * k := h_eq
      _ ≤ (1 / (1 + (n : ℝ)^2)) * k := by
        nlinarith
      _ = k / ((1 : ℝ) + (n : ℝ)^2) := by ring
  
  -- 级数 ∑ k/(1+n^2) 收敛
  have h_summable : Summable (λ (n : ℕ) => k / ((1 : ℝ) + (n : ℝ)^2)) := by
    have h_conv : Summable (λ (n : ℕ) => 1 / ((1 : ℝ) + (n : ℝ)^2)) := by
      -- 与 ∑ 1/n^2 比较
      have h_comp : ∀ n : ℕ, 1 / ((1 : ℝ) + (n : ℝ)^2) ≤ 1 / ((n : ℝ)^2) := by
        intro n
        refine one_div_le_one_div (by positivity) (by positivity) ?_
        nlinarith
      have h_sq : Summable (λ (n : ℕ) => 1 / ((n : ℝ)^2)) := by
        -- 已知 ∑ 1/n^2 收敛
        have h_sq' : Summable (λ (n : ℕ) => (1 : ℝ) / ((n : ℝ)^2)) := by
          refine (summable_nat_add_iff 1).mpr ?_
          -- 使用 p-级数收敛性
          sorry
        exact h_sq'
      exact Summable.of_nonneg_of_le (by intro n; positivity) h_comp h_sq
    exact h_conv.mul_left k
  
  -- 由比较判别法，∑ u_n 收敛
  have h_summable_u : Summable (λ (n : ℕ) => u k n) := by
    apply Summable.of_nonneg_of_le (by intro n; exact hpos n) h_bound h_summable
  
  -- 因此 ∑ |(-1)^n u_n| = ∑ u_n 收敛，故原级数绝对收敛
  have h_abs : ∀ n : ℕ, |((-1 : ℝ) ^ n) * u k n| = u k n := by
    intro n
    have h_abs_pow : |(-1 : ℝ) ^ n| = 1 := by
      simp [abs_pow, abs_neg, abs_one]
    calc
      |((-1 : ℝ) ^ n) * u k n| = |(-1 : ℝ) ^ n| * |u k n| := abs_mul _ _
      _ = 1 * |u k n| := by rw [h_abs_pow]
      _ = |u k n| := by simp
      _ = u k n := abs_of_nonneg (hpos n)
  
  have h_summable_abs : Summable (λ (n : ℕ) => |((-1 : ℝ) ^ n) * u k n|) := by
    simpa [h_abs] using h_summable_u
  
  exact Summable.of_abs h_summable_abs
